compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing test for AcliClient.get_issue_links()
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Write a failing unit test for a new AcliClient.get_issue_links(jira_key) instance method that queries existing issue links for a given Jira issue.

## Test Approach
Given: A mock ACLI Go binary that returns JSON with issue links (e.g., [{id: "12345", type: {name: "Relates"}, inwardIssue: {key: "PROJ-1"}, outwardIssue: {key: "PROJ-2"}}])
When: acli_client.get_issue_links("PROJ-1") is called
Then: Returns a parsed list of link dicts with type, inwardIssue, outwardIssue fields

Given: ACLI Go returns an error (non-zero exit)
When: get_issue_links("PROJ-1") is called
Then: Raises subprocess.CalledProcessError

Given: Issue has no links
When: get_issue_links("PROJ-1") is called
Then: Returns empty list

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py (Edit: add test class/functions for get_issue_links)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file contains test functions for get_issue_links() happy path, error, and empty cases
  Verify: grep -q "get_issue_links" tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py
- [ ] Tests fail when run (RED state — method does not exist yet)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py -k "get_issue_links" --tb=short -q 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED\|ERROR"
- [ ] No existing tests broken
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py --ignore-glob="*issue_links*" --tb=short -q

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): RED test must pin return format — list of link dicts matching Jira issuelinks shape: [{'type': {'name': 'Relates'}, 'outwardIssue': {'key': 'DSO-2'}}, {'type': {'name': 'Blocks'}, 'inwardIssue': {'key': 'DSO-3'}}].
comments.author: Test
